feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Seeing Red
entry.summary:
Author: Fururun

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,873Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 27

Summary: 15-year Bruce Wayne meets Clark Kent when the Smallville native is admitted into Gotham Academy on scholarship. He's poor, nerdy, and an easy target for the student body. But all Bruce wants is to see more of that red light he gets in his eyes when he's bullied.

entry.title: How to bond with bats
entry.summary:
Author: Bunnyreader7397

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,462Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 112

Summary: Funny random one-offs of day-to-day life in the Bat family household. When the house can’t hold anymore, the chaos floods into Gotham from time to time.Basically, a place to just throw a bunch of silly little things for my head-canons. Request accepted.I don't currently have a beta, so I apologize if some grammar is fucked up. If you'd be interested in partnering, let me know.

entry.title: Bring the Bird Home
entry.summary:
Author: dolcesher

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,121Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 158

Summary: There had been one universe they’d visited in which he and Clark were together. Married. But Bruce refused to think about it. Everything was easier that way.Except now stood a child that seemed to be from a universe much like that one, where he and Clark were not just together, but parents.An eleven year old Dick Grayson is mysteriously transported from a parallel universe where he was adopted by Bruce and Clark as a baby. While Bruce takes care of him, he examines his relationship with his sons, and a certain Kryptonian that won't leave him alone.

entry.title: Out of Tune
entry.summary:
Author: A_Hamilton

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,243Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: Bruce glared at him. Kal always took him seriously when he was concerned about a security risk. Sure, he’d always try to rationalize Bruce’s paranoia, but he never ever brushed his concerns away. Because he trusted him more than anyone. Because his opinion always came first. Except- Except when it came to Clark Kent. Because… Oh. Oh. Bruce swallowed. “I didn’t bug his apartment.” He deflected, voice coming out weaker than he intended. Oh, fuck. ~•~•~ Bruce Wayne knows two things about Clark Kent. Well no. Bruce Wayne knows a hell of a lot more about Clark Kent, but it boils down to two things. 1. Clark Kent is a threat2. Clark Kent is dating Superman The first is a problem. The second wouldn't be, if Bruce wasn't horribly, desperately in love with Kal-El. Which is a third problem. Bruce is doing fine.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The loser has to fall.
entry.summary:
Author: ShaipB

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,463Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 19

Summary: "Are you enjoying this moment?" Clark's voice sounded... odd for a moment, out of sync. He hadn't been sleeping well; with the patrols and the Riddler on the loose, sleep was hard to come by. Bruce just wanted to protect his boys. He wanted to believe they were safe, that asleep in their beds they were far from the dangers of Gotham. But waking up was always cold, and reality showed no mercy.

entry.title: I'm Back in the Fucking Building Again?!
entry.summary:
Author: The_Bluest_of_Blues

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,529Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 292

Summary: In a post apocalyptic future, Batman and Superman are left alone. Everyone else is dead. After they conclude that there is nothing left for them to save, they somehow find themselves waking up in their 14 year old bodies all the way back in 1984! Neither are apt to look a gift horse in the mouth.

entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,923Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 341

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. entry.title: pendant
entry.summary:
Author: floatingflowers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,892Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 121

Summary: Clark turned to face him, and Bruce could pinpoint the moment he registered his clothing, with the harsh intake of breath, the dilation of his eyes. Bruce bit down a smirk. “What? Something on my face?” “Bruce,” Clark replied, his voice almost a moan. “Bruce, baby.” Bruce simply tilted his head in faux confusion before letting his hand slide down his body, his fingers playing with the hem of the shirt. Clark stumbled over to him, his hands instantly finding Bruce’s waist and his thumbs rubbing over the fabric.

entry.title: World's Finest
entry.summary:
Author: aeej

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,931Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Clark Kent was sent with clear instructions: Get a statement from Bruce Wayne. Yet, predictably, Bruce is late. He’d long come to terms with facing Perry tomorrow as a failure, but refused to leave here empty-handed. However, this left him standing defeatedly attempting to comprehend the scene of garbled scribbles before him.  He tilted his head, pulling a face, feeling bested by A trombone, maybe? He sighed, adjusting his glasses as he raised his recorder. “Uh… ‘Femme… et… uh, boy sons?” He attempted, for his own clarification, later. “Portrays a witch woman…wailing over a broken trombone.” He whinged, tapping his recorder against his chin with an added “Real hard-hitting journalism, Clark,” Before disheartenedly shutting it off. He’d long tuned out the hushed whispers and illicit business affairs the groups had divided into, due to the unethical source of information and primarily to maintain his own willful ignorance.  Which is how he must’ve missed the approach of the man behind him. “That’s a bit harsh, no?”

entry.title: you know the two of us are just young gods
entry.summary:
Author: chilling_with_ducks

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,583Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 178

Summary: “He- he can’t- he doesn’t- he’s human?!” “Uh huh.” When she finally manages to salvage some dignity, Superman is already about a foot in the air, smiling something small and unbelievably fond. She scrambles to follow. “Incredible, isn’t he?” Courtney nods vigorously, and then finally registers exactly what it was that Batman had said. “The entire Watchtower?!” Superman actually scoffs. “Yeah. He’s rich rich.”Or:5 times Bruce is human, and how Clark loves him for it.

entry.title: Nowhere to Land
entry.summary:
Author: bloodvvitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,645Chapters: 21/25Kudos: 462

Summary: Bruce – recently injured and working a case that just won’t break – sees the tactical advantages of temporarily ‘dating’ Superman. Clark – who was almost too late to save his friend from a fatal fall – doesn’t understand what he’s signed up for. For two people who know each other so well, the World’s Finest just can’t manage to get on the same page.

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,200Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 874

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.
